label: Agent edit guardrails
disclaimer: Agents must produce reversible scenario patches and cite assumptions before applying edits.

checks.message: Layout edits must be represented as reversible scenario transactions.
Unknown structural elements cannot be modified without explicit confirmation.
Assumptions and before/after diffs must accompany generated changes.

questions: Should this be analysis-only, a draft scenario, or an applied edit?
Which objects, walls, fixtures, and rooms are locked?
What source evidence supports the proposed spatial change?
